<!--
Default PR template.

Use this when the change does not fit a specialized template.
Keep the PR limited to one logical change.
Mark as Draft if it is not ready for review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changed? Why is this needed? -->

## Related issue / context

<!-- Use keywords where applicable: Fixes #123, Closes #123, Related to #123. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Dependency update

## Implementation details

<!-- Explain the approach, important files, assumptions, tradeoffs, and alternatives rejected. -->

## Testing

<!-- List exact commands, environments, and manual checks. Do not write only "tested locally." -->

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration / end-to-end tests
- [ ] Manual verification
- [ ] Not tested; reason:

```text
# commands and results
```

## User-facing impact

- [ ] No user-facing change
- [ ] User-facing change; docs/examples updated
- [ ] Breaking change; migration path documented
- [ ] Requires changelog or release note
- [ ] Requires deployment, rollout, or communication plan

## Risk and rollback

Risk level: Low / Medium / High

Rollback plan:

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No security or privacy impact
- [ ] Security/privacy impact reviewed

<!-- Consider auth, permissions, secrets, PII, logging, telemetry, dependency risk, injection risk, and data retention. -->

## Reviewer guidance

Review focus:

Open questions:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is limited to one logical change.
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff before requesting review.
- [ ] Code follows the project style and conventions.
- [ ] Tests were added/updated, or a clear reason is given.
- [ ] Documentation, examples, changelog, or release notes were updated if needed.
- [ ] Backward compatibility and migration impact were considered.
- [ ] Non-obvious logic has comments.
- [ ] CI passes.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, generated noise, or unrelated files are included.
- [ ] AI-assisted changes, if any, were reviewed and tested by me.
